hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then rustfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false'); if [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; LAST_MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.last_assistant_message // empty'); if echo "$LAST_MSG" | grep -qi 'todo\|in.progress\|not yet\|still need\|remaining'; then echo 'Stop hook: detected incomplete work indicators in last message' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

echo 'COMPACTION REMINDER: Three principles: (1) Zero allocation on hot path (2) O(1) or fail at compile time (3) Every version pinned. Run cargo fmt + clippy + test before committing. Banned: .clone()/DashMap/dyn on hot path, cargo update, .env files, localhost, hardcoded values, println!/unwrap in prod. Check current phase doc for context.'

echo 'SUBAGENT CONTEXT: dhan-live-trader is a Rust 2024 O(1) latency trading system. Three principles: (1) Zero allocation on hot path (2) O(1) or fail at compile time (3) Every version pinned. No .clone()/DashMap/dyn on hot path. Use papaya, enum_dispatch, zerocopy. All versions from Tech Stack Bible V6 only.'

echo 'PRE-COMPACTION: Preserve in summary: (1) current phase and what was built (2) list of all modified files (3) any failing tests or unresolved errors (4) the three principles (5) cargo/git commands that were run and their results'
